title: Veterans Affairs Policy Reforms
description: Legislative proposals aimed at improving the Department of Veterans Affairs' healthcare services and claims process. S. 275 would modify the administration of the Veterans Community Care Program, allowing veterans to receive care from community providers. H.R. 740 extends the deadline for community health care providers to submit claims for payment. S. 1245 requires VA to accept additional evidence from veterans filing claims for mental health conditions caused by sexual trauma.
